opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I caught my foot on the edge of the stair, it ripped the top off a wart I've had on the sole of my foot for months, and now the pain is so sharp I can't walk on it at all.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It happened about two hours ago and it bled a bit and now I can't put any weight on that foot — I live on my own and I can't even get to the bathroom safely.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two hours ago, when I knocked my foot on a stair edge
symptom_narrative.duration: two hours and it still really hurts
symptom_narrative.character: a sharp, burning pain right where the wart is; the top of it got scraped off and it bled a little
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: about 9 out of 10 the moment I try to stand on it — I can't weight-bear at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the ball of my right foot, exactly where the wart is
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, spikes to severe whenever I try to stand
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping the foot up and not touching it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any attempt to stand or put weight on it
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: completely unable to walk or bear weight on the right foot; I live alone and can't safely get to the bathroom or kitchen

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a wart on the sole of my right foot that I've had for about three months
past_medical_history.how_managed: nothing much — I'd just been leaving it alone

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; currently housebound by the foot pain and worried about managing overnight on my own

objective_data_offered.value: a small lump on the sole of the right foot near the ball of the foot with the top surface scraped off and a little dried blood; the patient shows it on camera
I don't feel hot or shivery and I don't feel sick in myself — it's just the foot that hurts
patient attempts to stand on camera and immediately sits back down, saying the pain is too sharp to bear weight
